title: Login page not loading
description: Users see a blank screen after entering credentials. The login form does not submit properly.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Payments fail during checkout. The system shows a timeout error while processing transactions.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link does not work. Users are redirected to an invalid or expired page.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Sales numbers on the dashboard look incorrect. Exported reports show different values.

title: Mobile app crashes on launch
description: The mobile app closes immediately after opening. This happens mostly on Android devices.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: System alerts arrive much later than expected. Most users receive them after 30 minutes.

title: File upload failure
description: Users cannot upload large PDF files. Upload fails when the file exceeds 5MB.

title: Incorrect invoice generation
description: Generated invoices show wrong tax amounts. Customers reported calculation issues.

title: Search results not accurate
description: Search returns unrelated products. Filters do not seem to apply correctly.

title: API authentication error
description: External API calls fail with 401 errors. Authentication tokens appear invalid.

title: Profile image not updating
description: Users upload new profile photos successfully. However, the old image still appears.

title: Session timeout too short
description: Users are logged out too quickly. Sessions expire after only five minutes.
